docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - OEX (LATE FILINGS) FILED BY DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY
RETURN MAIL SEND TO GENE HIGA OF OEX CONTINUED ORDER-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY HEARING SET FOR JUN-14-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-25-2010 AS TO DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO AUG-12-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TENDERS PAYMENT OF $1000 IN OPEN COURT. IF JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED PRIOR TO CONTINUANCE DATE, PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT TO TAKE HEARING OFF CALENDAR AND SHALL PROVIDE A SATISFCTION OF JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2010 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-13-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. **ALL PARTIES SHALL APPEAR, UNLESS JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED.**
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER SIGNED AND FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "DENIED". "THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR TO DISCUSS THE STATUS OF PAYMENT ARRANGEMENT FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES,

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE (OEX) HEARING IS "APPROVED". ALL PARTIES SHALL APPEAR, UNLESS JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. HEARING DATE IS SET FOR SEPT-13-2010 AT 11:00 AM D506. SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO NOV-18-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS PAID $1500.00 AND HAS A BALANCE TO PAY OF $5772.35. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY $1000.00 PER MONTH STARTING OCTOBER 15, 2010 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT, IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE IN 1 MONTH INTERVALS. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
BENCH LETTER RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFT.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-17-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO BRING IN 3 MONTHS OF HIS FINANCIALS: PERSONAL, BUSINESS, ETC. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2010 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-18-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JENNIFER NGUYEN. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. CVANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HIGA, GENE D.B.A. GENE HIGA PHOTOGRAPHY
OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT GENE HIGA, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2010 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-06-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2010; JUDGMENT DEBTOR GENE HIGA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.
